mapper.select:
SELECT m.id, m.meal_no, m.customer_id, m.breakfast, m.lunch, m.dinner, m.special_need, m.meal_date, m.meal_img, m.create_time, m.update_time, c.name AS customer_name FROM meal m LEFT JOIN customer c ON m.customer_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE m.deleted = 0
AND (m.meal_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
